summary: Completed testing Sketchario V4 Iteration 9 features: project cover upload, content regeneration/conversion, and SMTP email for forgot password. Backend APIs working correctly, frontend login form has integration issues.

critical_bugs.issue: Login form not submitting properly - stays on login page despite valid credentials
critical_bugs.details: Backend API works correctly (200 response), but frontend form submission fails

ui_bugs.issue: Missing 'Password dimenticata?' link for forgot password feature
ui_bugs.details: Forgot password API works but UI link is missing

integration_issues.issue: Frontend login form not properly integrated with backend auth API

passed_tests: Content conversion to carousel API (POST /api/contents/convert) - 200 OK
Content conversion to reel API (POST /api/contents/convert) - 200 OK
Forgot password API (POST /api/auth/forgot-password) - 200 OK with email_sent=true
All existing V4 features (media upload, DALL-E, admin console, billing, feeds, queue)

critical_issues: Fix frontend login form submission - backend API works but frontend form doesn't submit properly
Add 'Password dimenticata?' link to login page for forgot password feature
configuration_needed: Add POSTNITRO_PRESET_ID to backend .env for PostNitro integration
Configure cloud import services (Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive) if needed

action_item_for_main_agent.testing_blocked: Cannot test dashboard project cover UI and content modal features due to login form issue
